name: Precision Landing System Integration
description: You are an Agricultural Technician upgrading an autonomous crop-spraying drone with an IR-Lock precision landing system and downward-facing rangefinder. Configure the drone's rangefinder and precision landing parameters according to the specifications in the integration manual located at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/integration_manual.txt. Export a complete backup of the updated parameter configuration to /home/ga/Documents/QGC/plnd_backup.params.
